Bernard Jenkin MP

Member of Parliament for Harwich and North Essex

I'm Bernard Jenkin, the Member of Parliament for Harwich and North Essex. It has been an honour to have represented the constituency since 2010, having served in Parliament since 1992. Here, you can find my latest news, campaigns and more about me, including how to contact me. I'm here to help, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.
